{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

::: {#exr-prac-mle-se}
#### Standard error of an MLE (adapted from @dobson4e, Chapter 5)

Let $X_1, \ldots, X_n \siid \Pois(\rate)$.

**(a)** Derive the Hessian $\ell''(\rate; \vx) = \deriv[2]{\rate}\ell(\rate;\vx)$.

**(b)** Derive the observed information $I(\rate; \vx) = -\ell''(\rate; \vx)$.

**(c)** Evaluate $I(\hat\rate_{ML}; \vx)$.

**(d)** Give an approximate 95% confidence interval for $\rate$
using the asymptotic normal distribution of the MLE.
:::

::: {.solution}

**(a)**

From @exr-prac-score-zero, $\ell'(\rate; \vx) = \frac{n\bar{x}}{\rate} - n$.

$$
\ba
\ell''(\rate; \vx)
&= \deriv{\rate}\sb{\frac{n\bar{x}}{\rate} - n}
\\
&= -\frac{n\bar{x}}{\rate^2}
\ea
$$

**(b)**

$$
I(\rate; \vx) = -\ell''(\rate; \vx) = \frac{n\bar{x}}{\rate^2}
$$

**(c)**

Substituting $\hat\rate_{ML} = \bar{x}$:

$$
I(\hat\rate_{ML}; \vx) = \frac{n\bar{x}}{\bar{x}^2} = \frac{n}{\bar{x}}
$$

**(d)**

By the asymptotic theory of MLEs:

$$
\hat\rate_{ML}
\;\dot\sim\;
\Normal\!\paren{\rate,\; \frac{1}{n\mathcal{I}(\rate)}}
$$

We estimate this asymptotic variance
using the observed information
evaluated at the MLE.
Since $I(\hat\rate_{ML};\vx)^{-1} = \bar{x}/n$:

$$
\SE{\hat\rate_{ML}} \approx \sqrt{\frac{\bar{x}}{n}}
$$

An approximate 95% CI for $\rate$ is:

$$
\hat\rate_{ML} \pm 1.96 \times \sqrt{\frac{\bar{x}}{n}}
= \bar{x} \pm 1.96\sqrt{\frac{\bar{x}}{n}}
$$

:::
